title: [MTR] [RESKIN] French cable car addon
description: This addon provides French-themed skins for the existing cable car system in Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR)
body:
This addon provides French-themed skins for the existing cable car system in Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR).

**It includes two visual variants inspired by real French installations:**

The Île-de-France skin is based on modern urban cable car projects from the Paris region. It features a clean, contemporary design suitable for dense metropolitan environments and modern transport networks.

The Les Gets skin is inspired by a traditional Alpine ski resort cable car. With its mountain-oriented style, it fits perfectly into snowy landscapes, mountain maps, and tourist resort environments.

**This addon does not add new vehicles or mechanics. It only introduces new textures and visual styles, fully compatible with the original MTR cable car functionality.**

**Requirements:**
Minecraft, Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR), and a compatible mod loader (Fabric if required).
